tasks.title: Extract session-validation helper from auth middleware
tasks.what: Pull the session-token verification logic out of AuthMiddleware.__call__ into a new module-level function validate_session(token: str) -> Session. Update AuthMiddleware to call the helper.
acceptanceCriteria: validate_session is defined at module scope in src/auth/middleware.py
AuthMiddleware.__call__ delegates token validation to validate_session
No behavior change for existing callers

tasks.title: Write tests for validate_session helper
tasks.what: Add unit tests in tests/auth/test_middleware.py covering: valid token, expired token, malformed token, missing token. Mock the session store boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file follows project test conventions
At least 4 test cases covering happy path, expired, malformed, and missing token

tasks.title: Move 409 carve-out from global to per-endpoint flag
tasks.what: src/services/api.ts:231 currently suppresses error popups for status 409 across every endpoint. Replace the global carve-out with a per-endpoint meta flag (suppressedStatusCodes: number[]) read by baseQueryWithReauth. Update postImage to declare suppressedStatusCodes: [409]; leave other endpoints empty so 409 from putEventEdit etc. surfaces an error popup.
acceptanceCriteria: baseQueryWithReauth reads suppressedStatusCodes from the endpoint definition
No global status-code carve-out remains in the error-popup branch

tasks.title: Write tests for per-endpoint 409 suppression
tasks.what: Add tests in __tests__/services/apiError.test.ts that mount the RTK Query store with two endpoints (postImage with suppressedStatusCodes: [409], putEventEdit with no suppression). Mock the fetch layer to return 409 for both. Assert the error-popup dispatch fires for putEventEdit and does NOT fire for postImage.
acceptanceCriteria: Asserts both branches: postImage 409 suppressed, putEventEdit 409 surfaces popup
Test fails if the implementation task is reverted (the global carve-out reintroduced)
